summary: FPV drone operators from the "Rassvet" group are targeting Ukrainian armored vehicles and equipment north of the Dobropillia line after the defeat near Krasnoarmiysk, with 234 enemy targets destroyed in a single day by "Rubicon" Center operators across multiple directions including Donbas and Sumy. Belarusian volunteer FPV crews from unit 1514 within HUR’s "Timur" special unit struck Russian forces on the Zaporizhzhia axis, while Ukrainian drones destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS after initial damage by a Bulava loitering munition. Russian soldiers attempting to assault Ukrainian positions on motorcycles or feigning surrender were eliminated by FPV drones, and Ukrainian forces survived an FPV attack in the Kostiantinivka direction after detecting the threat with a drone detector.
